tone_examples: Worth a look — JIDA Oct 2026 p.14
This one likely affects your high-risk adult cohort
If your case-mix is mostly cosmetic, may not be relevant

digest.title: 3-month fluoride varnish recall outperforms 6-month for high-risk adult caries
digest.summary: Multi-center Indian trial shows 38% lower caries recurrence with 3-month vs 6-month recall in adults with active decay history. No effect in low-risk patients.
digest.actionable: Reassess recall interval for adults flagged high-risk in your charting

digest.title: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15
digest.summary: Maximum dose per IOPA exposure drops from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv. E-speed film passes at the new limit; D-speed does not. Digital RVG sensors unaffected.
digest.actionable: Audit your X-ray setup before Dec 15; document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs

digest.title: IDA Delhi: Digital impressions — 2026 state of the art
digest.summary: Speaker: Dr. R. Mehta. Covers Primescan 2, Trios 5, and CAD/CAM workflow ROI for solo practices.
digest.actionable: Free for IDA members; ₹500 for non-members

digest.title: Clear aligner consultations searches +62% YoY in metros
digest.summary: 'Clear aligners near me' query growth concentrated in 28-45 age band; female-skewed. Pricing pressure as DIY aligner brands hit the market.
digest.actionable: Position your supervised-aligner offer against DIY in your GBP description

digest.title: Dentsply launches IPS e.max Press for zirconia crowns in India at ₹3,200/unit (Delhi labs)
digest.summary: Better aesthetic, similar fracture resistance to standard zirconia. Two Delhi labs (Dental Direkt, Siam Dental) confirmed stocking. Shared-lease scanner deals available.
digest.actionable: Worth comparing if crown work is >15% of monthly revenue

patient_content_library.title: 3 things your teeth tell you about your heart
patient_content_library.body: Periodontal disease shares inflammation pathways with cardiovascular disease. Bleeding gums, persistent bad breath, and loose teeth in middle age are early signals. A 2024 meta-analysis of 18 studies found periodontal patients had 22% higher CVD events. The simplest action: scaling every 6 months reduces both gum and inflammation markers.

patient_content_library.title: Why your child resists brushing — and what to try this week
patient_content_library.body: Most resistance under age 7 is sensory, not behavioural. Try: (1) a softer brush than you think necessary, (2) brushing in front of a mirror so they see what's happening, (3) two minutes of music as the timer. If resistance persists past 4 weeks, it's worth a pediatric dental consult.

patient_content_library.title: Aligners or braces? What I tell my patients in their 30s
patient_content_library.body: Aligners work for ~70% of cases — mild-to-moderate crowding, spacing, and minor rotations. Braces still win for severe rotations, deep bites, and skeletal corrections. The tell: if you can't keep aligners on for 22 hours/day, braces are the safer choice.

wedding whitening peak — bookings 2x baseline; ladies' segment dominant
